meta.description: US-based tech companies large enough to run dedicated recruiting + internship programs. Target for LinkedIn outreach to recruiters. Populate each company's 'recruiters' array over time with the recruiter object schema below.
meta.use_case: Connect with recruiters at top US tech companies on LinkedIn to source SWE / AI internship opportunities.

recruiter_object_schema.focus_area: e.g. University Recruiting / SWE Intern / New Grad

company_field_legend.name: Company name
company_field_legend.linkedin_company_url: Company LinkedIn page. Curated entries are hand-verified; bulk entries are auto-derived from the name.
company_field_legend.recruiter_search_url: LinkedIn People-tab link filtered to recruiters at this company (open & harvest profiles)
company_field_legend.id: Unique sequential ID (C0001...) for counting & tracking
company_field_legend.linkedin_url_verified: true = hand-verified slug; false = auto-derived from name (may 404 / hit wrong page — spot-check before trusting)
company_field_legend.sector: Primary sector partition key used by Codex sector workers and UI filtering
company_field_legend.description: Concise company description for search, semantic matching, and outreach context

meta.recruiter_links_note: recruiter_search_url is a name-based LinkedIn People search ('<company> recruiter') that works for every company without needing the exact company page slug — open it to see current recruiters, then paste individual profile URLs into recruiters[]. Each company has a unique 'id' (C0001...) so the list is countable/verifiable. NOTE: the first ~263 entries are curated with HQ/size/company-slug; the bulk entries carry verified real names + working recruiter links, with HQ/slug left blank to enrich.
meta.notes: Sector working file for Semiconductors / Hardware. Codex agents edit only this file; the orchestrator merges sector files back into canonical recruiter.json.
meta.ui_directory: recruiter-directory/ (Next.js searchable UI with direct LinkedIn links + CSV export)
meta.population_progress: Codex sector split. 873 companies populated with 1937 total recruiters; 1250 company descriptions missing. Merge run: 2026-06-01
